title: Derive Release 121 assistance from qualified Release 1201
description: Pin the Release 1201 manifest and artifact hash as the exact base for the assistance layer.
close_reason: The stage validates Tara's tree, Release 1201, and base artifact SHA-256 before applying assistance changes.

title: Add the state-neutral Glulx action hook
description: Invoke an assistance hook after PRSA, PRSO, and PRSI are assigned without replacing normal dispatch.
close_reason: Both PERFORM variants invoke ASSIST-ACTION-HOOK, which records context, returns false, and leaves normal behavior authoritative.

title: Port GOALS and EXITS to Glulx
description: Add optional canonical orientation commands without changing navigation or puzzle outcomes.
close_reason: GOALS and EXITS compile and pass the shared opening semantic route under both dfrotz and Glulxe.

title: Port three-tier HINT to Glulx
description: Reset hints by room and reveal progressively more explicit canonical guidance.
close_reason: All three opening hint tiers pass in equivalent Release 121 .z3 and Release 1211 .ulx routes.

title: Port canonical-state RECAP to Glulx
description: Report established canonical persistent changes without importing later expanded scenery or geography state.
close_reason: RECAP reports canonical persistent flags and passes the initial shared semantic route.

title: Port contextual WHY to Glulx
description: Remember selected immediately preceding failed actions and explain them without replacing the original failure response.
close_reason: CLIMB HOUSE retains its original failure and WHY supplies the roof explanation in both formats.

title: Port USE affordance guidance to Glulx
description: Describe plausible object roles while requiring concrete player commands.
close_reason: USE compiles with representative object guidance and the generic fallback passes cross-VM parity.

title: Reconcile Tara Glulx action vocabulary
description: Handle action constants that differ from the Release 121 Z-machine grammar without inventing new parser actions.
close_reason: An exact patch removes unavailable V?PULL from the control-panel hook while retaining PUSH, MOVE, and TURN.

title: Qualify Release 1211 across .z3 and .ulx
description: Build, verify, run, and compare the assistance layer under standard Z-machine and Glulx interpreters.
close_reason: The shared nine-move route passes every assistance marker under dfrotz and pinned Glulxe/CheapGlk.

title: Lock and publish the assisted Glulx layer
description: Commit artifact identity, fail-closed CI, qualification records, PR documentation, and the next reactive-surface boundary.
close_reason: Release 1211 is locked at 185600 bytes, checksum 0xd3e2209e, and SHA-256 cf5e51d414bd786bdb4e911263534dcb5c9c61aaebc35b944a96e5269a864777 with reactive scenery explicitly deferred.
